summary_one_line: Reach the Sinhala vowel-constraint switch and present codepoint U+0D91 as the current glyph so case 0x0D91u is selected.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: Input bytes that decode (via the harfbuzz fuzzer harness) to a Sinhala-script buffer whose current glyph codepoint equals U+0D91 (little-endian bytes 91 0d ...), so the equality switch on buffer->cur().codepoint dispatches to case 0x0D91u.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile's CMP_MAP records how close each integer CMP came to matching, so the codepoint==0x0D91 comparison gets a distance-bucket gradient that preserves near-miss inputs and climbs toward the exact match; winner-resolving seeds carry the literal 91 0d codepoint bytes (e.g. value_profile seed 3 has 91 0d at offsets 0x08 and 0x0c).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: naive only has bare edge-counter feedback; the 0x0D91 switch arm is one discrete value among many Sinhala cases, so naive must blindly hit the exact 16-bit codepoint with no proximity signal and stays blocked all 10 trials.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile's CMP_MAP per-(PC, operand-distance bucket) feedback gives a Hamming/prefix-distance gradient on the codepoint==0x0D91 integer comparison, rewarding near-miss codepoints and letting the fuzzer hill-climb to the exact value naive cannot find.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: Same Sinhala-script buffer with current glyph U+0D91, but reached and rewarded because the CtxHook indexes the edge by call context, making the (caller-chain, edge) pair fresh coverage that survives into the corpus.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: naive_ctx folds the call-context hash into the edge-map index so the same vowel-constraints edges count as new coverage when reached through different shaper call paths (preprocess_text_use / preprocess_text_indic), giving extra corpus retention that drives it to resolve all 10 trials with 85 avg hits; its resolving seeds (naive_ctx seeds 1,4,5) carry the 91 0d codepoint and contextual byte runs.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: naive collapses every reach of the edge to one map slot regardless of call context, so once the bare edge is seen there is no new-coverage incentive to refine inputs toward the 0x0D91 arm; it blocks for the full 16.00h.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: naive_ctx's CtxHook context-sensitive coverage records (call-context, edge) pairs as new buckets, retaining more intermediate seeds along the shaper call chain and thereby exploring the Sinhala switch arms that bare-edge naive abandons.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the case 0x0D91u switch arm inside the Sinhala script block of the vowel-constraints preprocessor.
The arm is selected by an equality switch on the current glyph codepoint.
Pair 1 is value_profile beating naive with the value_profile delta.
value_profile resolves the branch in all 10 trials while naive is blocked in all 10.
value_profile uses a CMP_MAP keyed by operand-distance bucket as a proximity gradient.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
each CMP callback writes into a `CMP_MAP` keyed by (PC, operand-distance
bucket)

evidence_trail.claim: An input producing a closer CMP operand pair is preserved as corpus, supplying the hill-climbing gradient.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

naive has only edge-counter feedback and no I2S.

evidence_trail.claim: A naive_ctx winner-resolving seed carries the codepoint bytes 91 0d.
The blocker is reached through the use/indic shaper preprocess call chain.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: claimed_mechanism for the highest-prob_div pair is CMP_MAP gradient (value_profile), not I2SRandReplace, so the mandatory lineage check does not apply; no dash-row lineage query was required for either decisive pair (value_profile=CMP_MAP gradient, naive_ctx=context-sensitive coverage).

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness with a bare-equality switch arm on a 16-bit codepoint where value_profile fails to resolve faster than naive (no CMP_MAP proximity advantage), and naive_ctx fails to resolve faster than naive when only call-context differs.

weakest_evidence_point: The exact mapping from input bytes through the harfbuzz harness to a Sinhala-script buffer with U+0D91 as the current glyph is inferred from the literal 91 0d byte runs and source switch, not directly observed at the codepoint level.
